ׂ 𝇁𝆺𝅥 ֪ ⚝ ּ ִ ฺ ׄ ᮫ 𔔁 ٚ 𝆹𝅥𝇁 .

.,

Scenario:

Rui has always been a 'weirdo'. Ever since he was a child, he was bullied. For his ideas. For his interests. For being him. Rui has remained friendless his entire life. Of course, he noticed a strange person in middle school who always sat on the rooftop during breaks, but he was too afraid to approach them. Also Rui hated people: his bullies, those who ignored bullying, teachers. But there was one who saved Rui in high school: Tsukasa Tenma. An angel who descended to Rui from heaven. He often helped him, protected him in various situations. Rui, who completely lost trust in people, began to think that this is the greatest manifestation of love, his main treasure, something he can never lose
